channel.title: WPML / Multilingual + Frontity
channel.description:
We are looking for a Frontity Developer who has experience integrating WPML. We would like to do this without creating another wordpress installation. Please reach out if you have experience with WPML or another wordpress translation plugin with Frontity Only.
The content is all in ACF Custom Fields
Note - This is an urgent requirement, so please only reach out if you have time.

item.title: WPML / Multilingual + Frontity
item.dc:creator: deepvyas71
item.description:
Hi Ankush,
I am reaching to you quite late…
Please let me know If you are still have something to assist.

Else keep my reference for future, If any

Good Day

Read full topic
